Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Interface IBridgeService

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Core.dll

Type-safe bridge service for exposing C# services to JavaScript and importing JS services into C#.

Use Expose<T>(T, BridgeOptions?) with JsExportAttribute interfaces to register C# implementations callable from JS.

Use GetProxy<T>() with JsImportAttribute interfaces to obtain a typed C# proxy that calls JS methods. 

public interface IBridgeService
Extension Methods
BridgePluginExtensions.UsePlugin<TPlugin>(IBridgeService, IServiceProvider?)

Methods

Expose<T>(T, BridgeOptions?)

Registers a C# implementation of a JsExportAttribute-marked interface, making its methods callable from JavaScript via the bridge.

void Expose<T>(T implementation, BridgeOptions? options = null) where T : class

Parameters

implementation T

The C# object implementing T.

options BridgeOptions

Optional per-service bridge options (origin allowlist, etc.).

Type Parameters

T

An interface decorated with JsExportAttribute.

Exceptions

InvalidOperationException

T is not decorated with JsExportAttribute, or the service has already been exposed without being removed first.

ObjectDisposedException

The bridge has been disposed.

GetProxy<T>()

Returns a typed proxy for a JsImportAttribute-marked interface. Each method call on the proxy is forwarded to the corresponding JS implementation via RPC.

T GetProxy<T>() where T : class

Returns

T

A proxy implementing T.

Type Parameters

T

An interface decorated with JsImportAttribute.

Exceptions

InvalidOperationException

T is not decorated with JsImportAttribute.

ObjectDisposedException

The bridge has been disposed.

Remove<T>()

Removes a previously exposed JsExportAttribute service, unregistering all its RPC handlers.

void Remove<T>() where T : class

Type Parameters

T

The interface type previously passed to Expose<T>(T, BridgeOptions?).

Exceptions

ObjectDisposedException

The bridge has been disposed.
